top_signals.title: Gold Set for Weekly Loss as Hawkish Fed Outweighs Peace Deal
top_signals.summary: Gold is on track for a third weekly loss, as a hawkish Federal Reserve and rate-hike bets outweigh the signing of an interim peace deal between the US and Iran.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: CFTC Not Ready for Prediction Market Social Cost, State AGs Say
top_signals.summary: Attorneys general for California and Minnesota said the Commodity Futures Trading Commission isn’t equipped to handle gambling-associated issues like addiction, highlighting challenges the federal regulator faces as it aims to assert authority over prediction markets.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Three Saudi oil tankers carrying 6 million barrels cross Strait of Hormuz
top_signals.summary: The Saudi tankers switched their transponders on Thursday after hiding their location for more than two months.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Forget Critical Metals, Electricity is The Real Bottleneck for Artificial Intell
top_signals.summary: The U.S. dollar is cracking—and the market knows it. After years of monetary excess, swelling deficits, and policy uncertainty, the world’s reserve currency is losing its grip as a store of value. Capital is fleeing paper promises and piling into hard assets at a pace not seen in decades. Nowhere is this more visible than in precious metals: Gold has surged to above $4,100 per ounce, silver has ripped past $70, and palladium—once written off—has clawed its way back to $1,350. Add an unstable geopolitical backdrop stretching…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Trump hits back at critics as Iran peace deal fuels debate over U.S. concessions
top_signals.summary: The deal sees both sides commit to further talks to reach a final agreement over the next 60 days and includes a $300 billion plan for Iran's reconstruction.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Cook, The Opportunities and Risks AI Presents for the Economy and Financial System
top_signals.summary: Speech At the Stanford Institute for Economic Policy Research, Stanford University, Stanford, California
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Agencies remove additional references to reputation risk
top_signals.summary: Agencies remove additional references to reputation risk

top_signals.title: Barr, Measuring Financial Health
top_signals.summary: Speech At EMERGE Financial Health 2026 Scaling Progress, Shaping the Future, Atlanta, Georgia

top_signals.title: In photos: Star-studded crowd gathers to celebrate the Obama Presidential Center dedication
top_signals.summary: Barack Obama opened his presidential center in Chicago with former presidents, celebrities and dignitaries in attendance. President Donald Trump was absent.
